tasks.title: Web XSS hardening sweep
tasks.description: Batch 1 (P0 Security + Stability). Audit apps/web for unsafe dynamic HTML insertion and patch XSS-prone render paths. Replace unsafe innerHTML usage with safe DOM APIs or sanitized rendering. Add targeted malicious payload regression tests. Labels: mvp, p0, security, prod-readiness.

tasks.title: SusLink URL validation + security tests
tasks.description: Batch 1 (P0 Security + Stability). Harden URL intake and scanner boundaries in modules/suslink and apps/web/src/app/tools/domain-verifier/page.tsx. Enforce protocol/length/format checks and add abuse-case tests. Labels: mvp, p0, security, capability-gap.

tasks.title: Deploy post-verification + rollback automation
tasks.description: Batch 1 (P0 Security + Stability). Add fail-fast post-deploy verification and rollback paths for deploy-vps.sh and scripts/deploy-gcloud.sh. Include dry-run docs for rollback. Labels: mvp, p0, infra, security, prod-readiness.

tasks.title: Secrets and env preflight guardrail
tasks.description: Batch 1 (P0 Security + Stability). Add required env-key checks, placeholder blocking, and secret-safe logging to deploy-vps.sh, scripts/deploy-gcloud.sh, and the active GCP service deploy flow. Labels: mvp, p0, infra, security, prod-readiness.

tasks.title: Discord bot command tests from stubs to deterministic coverage
tasks.description: Batch 2 (Core Behavior). Replace placeholder tests in apps/discord-bot/tests/commands/{scan,ping,tip,trust,tiltcheck}.test.ts with deterministic metadata/happy-path/error-path tests using stable mocks only. Labels: mvp, p1, stubbed, prod-readiness.

tasks.title: Resolve /api/stats contract (endpoint or fallback UX)
tasks.description: Batch 2 (Core Behavior). Resolve apps/web/index.html TODO for /api/stats. Either implement endpoint + UI adapter + tests, or remove hard dependency and render explicit fallback UX. Labels: mvp, p1, contract-mismatch, capability-gap.

tasks.title: Trust-rollup external fetcher TODO resolution
tasks.description: Batch 3 (Readiness). Address affiliate/compliance TODOs in apps/trust-rollup/src/external-fetchers.ts with implementation or feature-flagged degraded mode + telemetry. Labels: mvp, p1, capability-gap, prod-readiness.

tasks.title: Baseline tests for control-room and user-dashboard
tasks.description: Batch 3 (Readiness). Replace no-test placeholders with baseline smoke and critical-path tests in apps/control-room and apps/user-dashboard. Labels: mvp, p1, stubbed, prod-readiness.

tasks.title: Chrome extension unit test harness setup
tasks.description: Batch 3 (Readiness). Implement background/content test environment and replace TODO-only tests in apps/chrome-extension/tests/unit. Labels: mvp, p1, stubbed, prod-readiness.
